meta.name: Truong Trung Nghia
meta.title: Truong Trung Nghia — Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Truong Trung Nghia, a Full Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience building enterprise-grade web applications in PHP, Laravel, CodeIgniter, and React.
meta.ogDescription: Full Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience across Fintech, E-commerce, IoT, SaaS, Booking, and ERP domains.

hero.name: Truong Trung Nghia
hero.summary: I build enterprise-grade web applications in PHP (Laravel, CodeIgniter) and React — shipping 7+ production systems across Fintech, E-commerce, IoT, SaaS, Booking, and ERP over 2+ years, from multi-tenant architecture to real-time IoT pipelines.

about.title: Turning complex problems into elegant solutions

cards.title: Enterprise Focus
cards.desc: Specializing in PHP (Laravel, CodeIgniter) and React for high-throughput production systems serving thousands of users.

cards.title: Clean Architecture
cards.desc: Follows SOLID principles, Clean Code practices, and MVC/OOP patterns to build maintainable, scalable codebases.

cards.title: Security First
cards.desc: Builds with CSRF protection, OAuth2, JWT, RBAC, and AWS security best practices from day one.

cards.title: Measurable Impact
cards.desc: ~80% accounting time saved, 60% faster checkouts, 90%+ anomaly reduction — engineering choices that move metrics.

bullets: Built B2B2C digital checkout pipeline serving 1,000+ municipalities on multi-tenant architecture
Engineered automated financial reconciliation engine — ~80% reduction in accounting time
Designed digital loyalty coin system (Furusato Nozei) — 25% increase in repeat usage
Built RBAC role management dashboard — 50% faster admin onboarding
Delivered 5+ production projects across Fintech, E-commerce, SaaS, Booking, and ERP domains
Integrated Stripe and PayPal payment gateways with retry logic and webhook verification
Implemented CSRF protection, OAuth2 flows, and JWT-based auth across all projects
Deployed and managed services on AWS EC2, S3, Lambda, and CloudFront

items.name: Unioss
items.desc: Furusato Nozei e-commerce + IoT vending machine platform for 1,000+ Japanese municipalities — multi-tenant, loyalty coins, financial reconciliation, real-time IoT terminals.

items.name: Nippoh
items.desc: B2B IoT construction monitoring SaaS — real-time sensor ingestion via AWS IoT Core/MQTT, WebAssembly 3D visualization, cryptographic tamper detection, Azure AD SSO.
features: AWS IoT Core + MQTT real-time sensor pipeline
Azure AD SSO for enterprise authentication

items.name: Nail Booking
items.desc: Multi-platform booking system for salon chains — multi-tenant architecture, OAuth2 social login, background job scheduling, performance-optimized APIs.
features: OAuth2 + JWT refresh token auth flow
35% error reduction via comprehensive test coverage

items.name: Misa ERP
items.desc: Enterprise Resource Planning system for Misa Group — multi-layer modular architecture, RBAC across departments, Redis HA cluster, CI/CD pipeline, mobile REST API.
features: RBAC across all departments and user roles
CI/CD with GitHub Actions + Docker deployment

contact.title: Let's build something great
contact.desc: Open to full-time roles and freelance work. Reach out and I'll get back to you within a day.
